name: Cabbage Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Port wine, or to taste
1 cup Herb seasoned stuffing mix, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in the butter and pour off excess grease.
2. Add cabbage, onion, salt, and pepper. Cover and cook slowly until the cabbage is translucent (about 10 minutes).
3. Add cheese, sour cream, and wine. Mix thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture into a warmed and greased casserole dish.
5. Top with herb seasoned stuffing mix crumbs.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until the crumbs are browned (10-15 minutes). Serves 4-6.
